---
title: 'Untitled Post'
date: '2015-06-28T20:25:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '4555823661940946493'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<p class="mobile-photo"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0628151524-701594-df8a597b29af.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0628151524-701594-a1ba4f10bc1c.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6165524784320839362" /></a></p>#DrPepper sign @Kincaids.
